_publications._publicationTitle: Use of machine learning to predict cognitive performance based on brain metabolism in Neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Only the first component (PC1) showed a significant correlation between observed and predicted values ( r = 0.926, p<0.001).
details: Successfully predicted principal component 1 with high accuracy (r = 0.926, p<0.001) using Gaussian Process Regression, explaining 34.8% of neuropsychological data variance
